author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Changed LocksFile.locks from HashMap<String, Lock> to HashMap<i64, Lock>. Added custom serde module (string_key_map) for backward-compatible JSON serialization with string keys on disk. Removed all .to_string() key conversions and .parse() key lookups across locks.rs, sync/locks.rs, server/handlers/agents.rs, and test files. All 1665 tests pass including proptest roundtrip.
